title: Add Tutorial Video to Salesforce Add Instance Help Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user adding a new Salesforce instance, I want a tutorial video embedded on the help page, so that I can follow along visually while setting up my connection.
description:
Embed a YouTube tutorial video on the Salesforce "Add Instance" help page to guide users through the process of adding multiple Salesforce orgs.

## Resources
- YouTube video: https://youtu.be/c1hjMYra3aU
- Tutorial page: https://datatoolspro.com/tutorials/adding-multiple-salesforce-orgs-into-datatools-pro/
- Topic: Loading Salesforce CRM Analytics Dashboards in DataTools Pro
acceptance_criteria: Tutorial video is embedded on the Salesforce Add Instance help page
Video plays correctly within the application
Video has rel=0 parameter to restrict related videos
ux_changes: YouTube tutorial video embedded on the Salesforce Add Instance help page.
implementation_notes: Embedded the provided YouTube video on the Add Instance help page. Links to the full tutorial on the DataTools Pro website.
comment_summary: Developer implemented and pushed to development for review.
